titleStmt.title: SII 38.220: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 220. (A.R. No. 220 of 1912.) TIRUVOṞṞIYŪR, SAIDAPET TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On the east, west and north bases of the Naṭarāja shrine, Ādhipurīśvara temple.

summary.p: Beginning of lines is built in. The extant portion commences with malamagaḷ puṇarndu, the king's usual mēykīrtti which begins with Tingaḷēr taru-taṉ.

Records that the mahāsabhās of Sundarachōḷa-chaturvēdimaṅgalam and Vāṉavaṉmādēvi-chaturvēdimaṅgalam of Puḻar-nāḍu in Puḻar-kōṭṭam in Jayaṅkoṇḍachōḻamaṇḍalam, sold twenty-two thousand kuḻi of land amounting to forty-four mā of land in several plots with all the appurtening rights to the Tiruvoṟṟiyūr temple for providing food offerings to Kārāṇai-viṭaṅkadēvar, the deity of the temple. It is stated that the mahāsabhās sold this land to the dēvakanmīs of the temple, on the order of the deity Chaṇḍēsvaradēvar, who was in the inner precints of the temple. All the taxes that was leviable on the land iṟai, echchōṟu etc., were exempted.
The madhyastha of Tiruvoṟṟiyūr, Kūtta •••• Paḷḷikoṇḍāṉ wrote the deed at the behest of Kandayakkramavittaṉ and Nārāyaṇa Bhaṭṭaṉ of Veṟpuram, a locality of Tiruvoṟṟiyūr.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
malamakaḷ puṇarntu ceṅkolocci karumkalikaṭintu maṉṉupallūḻiyuṭ ṭeṉṉavarmuvaruḷ māṉāparaṇaṉ poṉmuṭiyāṉap parumaṇip pacun=talai porukaḷattarintu virakeraḷaṉaik kavittu cevil cun=tarapāṇṭiyaṉait ticaikeṭattollaiyil mullaiyūrtturatti Olkalil veṇāṭṭaraicaic coṇāṭotukku mevu pukaḻirāmakuṭa muvar keṭa muṉintu velaikeḻuk kāntaḷurccālai kalamaṟuttākava mallaṉum Acaṟakevutaṉ Iṅkarum paṭaiyāl Āṅkavaṉ ceṉaiyuḷ kaṇṭappayyanuṅ kaṅkātaraṉum vaṇṭamarkaḷiṟṟoṭum maṭiyat tiṇṭiṟal viritaravikkiyum vicaiyātittaṉum karumuraṭcāṅkamayyaṉum nimāṭataṭṭoḷa noṭayaṉum karippuraviyoṭum piṭittut taṉṉāṭaiyaṟa jayaṅkoṇṭoṉ koḷḷippākkai Oḷḷeri Oru taṉit taṇṭāṟ por tiraiyuṭutta Ilaṅkaikkiṟaivaṉ Aḷaṅkalmuṭi marinturiṉami kai kuṭain=ta teṉṟamiḻ maṇṭalamum muḻuvatum Iḻan=ta teṉ kaṭaliḻam pukku Ilaṅkesa(ra)ṉākiya vikkirama pāṇṭiyaṉ parumaṇimuṭi taṭin=tiṇṭariya
śrī rājādhirājadevaṟku yāṇṭu 2 10 8 Āvatu jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattup puḻaṟkoṭṭattup puḻaṟnāṭṭu cun=taracoḻaccatuppetimaṅkalattum vānavaṉmāteviccatuppeti maṅkalattum mahāsabhaiyom nilavilaikaiyyeḻuttu Ikkoṭṭattu Iṉṉāṭṭu tiruvoṟṟiyūruṭaiyār kārāṇaiviṭaṅkadevarkku Ikkoyil Uḷḷāleḻuntaruḷirukkum caṇḍaśvaradevar Ādesattāl devakaṉmikaḷ pakkal kācu Orāṇṭu Ittevarkku veṇṭum nimandhattukku viṟṟuk kuṭutta nilam Āvatu Eṅkaḷurp piṭākai cekkāṭṭur nilattut tiruvoṟṟiyuraṉvatikkuk kiḻakku Arumoḻiteva vāykkālukku vaṭakku Eḻāṅkaṇṇāṟṟu mutalccaturattuk kiḻakkaṭaiya nilam mūṉṟumāvum Eḻāṅkaṇṇāṟṟu Iraṇṭāñcaturattu nilam Āṟumāvum Eḻāṅkaṇṇāṟṟu muṉṟāñcaturattu nilam Āṟumāvum Eṭṭāṅkaṇṇāṟṟu mutalcaturattu kiḻakkaṭaiya nilam muṉṟu māvum Eṭṭāṅkaṇṇāṟṟu Iraṇṭāñcaturattu nilam Āṟumāvum Eṭṭāṅ kaṇ
ṇṇāṟṟu muṉṟāñ caturattil nilam Āṟumāvum Iṅkey Iraṇṭāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟu muṉṟāñcaturattuk kiḻakkaṭaiya nilam nālu māvum Ākakkaṭṭaḷaippaṭi nāṟpattu nālu māvināl patiṉāṟucāṇ kolālkkuḻi Irupattirāyiramum Innilattukku Erikaḷam niroṭu vāykkālkaḷum tulaiyumtulaivāykaḷum maṇṇummaṇpāṭum menokkiya maramuṅ kiṇokkiya kiṇaṟum Eppe(o)ṟppaṭṭatum Uṇṇilam Oḻiviṉṟiye viṟṟivilaiyāvaṇañ ceytukuṭuttom Emmilicain=ta vilaipporuḷaṟakkoṇṭu viṟṟu vilaiyāvaṇañceytu kuṭuttom Iru kālāvatum viṟṟu vilai Āvaṇam ceytu kuṭuttom Ituve poruḷmāvaṟutip poruṭccilavolaiyāvatākavum Ituvallatu veṟuporuḷ māvaṟuti poruṭccilavolai kāṭṭak kaṭavarallātāka (āka)vum Ipparicu Emmilicain=ta vilaip poruḷaṟak koṇṭu viṟṟu vilaiyāvaṇam ceytu kuṭuttom Iṉṉilam cuṭṭivan=ta miṟaiyum Eccoṟu
Uṭaiyār koyilil kalluveṭṭikoḷḷap peṟuvārkaḷākavum Ipparicu Icaintu viṟṟu vilaiyāvaṇam ceytu kuṭuttom melcollappaṭṭa tiruvoṟṟiyūr kārāṇaiviṭaṅka devaṟku piṟcollappaṭṭa mahāsabhaiyom Ipparicu lakṣaṇa Eḻutappaṇiccār Ivvūr veṟppuṟattu kan=tayakkiramavittāṉ paṇiyālum veṟpuṟattunārāyaṇa paṭṭaṉ paṇiyālum Eḻutineṉ Ivvūr madhya[ stan kū] tta paḷḷikoṇṭāneṉ Ivai Enṉeḻuttu panmāheśvarakṣaiḥ §
Digital edition of SII 38.220 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
